visual_findings: The application Drawing Review screenshot was captured successfully and is the final acceptance evidence for this attempt.
The explicit DisplayDim path improved the drawing by creating real SolidWorks DisplayDim objects before SaveAs, and the dense slanted AutoDimension-like stack is not the acceptance path.

The generated drawing is still visually unacceptable: dimensions are concentrated around the front/right view area instead of matching the reference drawing's distributed manufacturing annotation layout.
The final persisted DisplayDim count is still 11/12, so one required reference-intent dimension is missing.
The right-side projection and small-feature/callout region still do not visually match the same-name reference drawing closely enough for manufacturing review.
API/status fields remain supporting evidence only and do not override this FAIL visual judgement.

improvement_evidence.post_layout_recovery_issue: post_layout reference-intent view slot rebinding returned target_view_not_found, so the missing DisplayDim could not be restored after reopen/prune.

cases.required_next_action: Keep 006 scoped first, keep AutoDimension disabled for reference-intent acceptance, fix post-layout view slot rebinding or dimension preservation so all 12 required real SolidWorks DisplayDim annotations persist, then rerun CAD and Drawing Review UI screenshot validation.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
